case_title: JOHANNA CHAN VS. JIMMY HUEY et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, JOHANNA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (SERVICE FEE $30.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, JOHANNA AS TO DEFENDANT HUEY, HARVEY
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, REQUESTING COURT CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, JOHANNA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED OCT-22-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUEY, JIMMY
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT HUEY, JIMMY HUEY, HARVEY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-20-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-20-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDAMT HARVEY HUEY WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER KENNY FONG PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-20-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, JOHANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUEY, JIMMY HUEY, HARVEY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,060.00, DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO FOLLOW ESTABLISHED PROCEDURES TO REPOSSESS THE RENTED UNIT BASED ON ABANDONMENT CREATES LIABILITY FOR WRONGFUL EVICTION, FOR WHICH THE COURT AWARDS DAMAGES. IN ADDITION, WITHIN 10 DAYS AFTER JUDGMENT BECOMES FINAL, THE PARTIES SHALL COOPERATE IN RETURNING ANY STORED PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BY DEFENDANT HUEY, JIMMY HUEY, HARVEY
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (RE: JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO PAY JUDGMENT TO COURT AND NOTIFICATION TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR-CHECK DEPOSITED ON MAR-15-2011) AS TO DEFENDANT HUEY, JIMMY HUEY, HARVEY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CHAN, JOHANNA AS TO DEFENDANT HUEY, JIMMY HUEY, HARVEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-20-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, JOHANNA AS TO DEFENDANT HUEY, JIMMY HUEY, HARVEY
